---

I take you step by step, bit by bit, through Steve Jobs's 2007 MacWorld iPhone launch
and teach you to use the same strategies that Jobs used to engage, communicate, and
inspire his audience.
By learning from the best and dissecting his strategies moment by moment, we, too,
can find the path to excellence in storytelling.
